body.summary: URGENT: Review LOCK 016 spec for Tripp.Control Runtime Adapter Boundary Specification.
body.context: This defines the contract for how future runtime layers plug into governance spine. Metadata-only, no implementation. For your local machine.
body.spec_extract: LOCK 016 creates defineRuntimeBoundary(input) that returns boundary metadata. All runtime flags false. Defines adapter contract without implementing it.
body.your_job: Review from local safety perspective. Does this correctly block runtime on your machine? Return structured feedback.
body.output_format: JSON response with review_items array. Each item: {severity, category, description, suggestion}
